original_image_tags: Circular logo with the letters "F.C.S.D." at the top. Inside the circle are stylized symbols including a triangle pointing down with a horizontal line through it, a curved shape resembling a "9", and three small circles. A cross-like shape is at the bottom.

elements.description: A circular logo or emblem containing the letters 'F.C.S.D.' above a stylized drawing of two figures. Located on the left page above a text block.

judge.reason: The descriptions differ on key visual content: Description A lists specific internal symbols (triangle, curved shape, circles, cross) while Description B states there are 'two figures', presenting a fundamental disagreement about the depicted objects.
